LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. AS TO PETITIONER THE CLOCKTOWER LOFTS OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S HEARING ON PETITION, THE PETITION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PETITIONER THE CLOCKTOWER LOFTS OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Hearing On Petition, the petition is granted. No opposition was filed. Petitioner to prepare an order with findings in compliance with Cal. Civil Code sec. 4275(c). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
